languages.text: "Он полностью функционален. Однако его функционал фактически отличается от того, что ему приписывает {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}магос{/g} Эоганн. Демонстрация покажет что я имею ввиду".

traits.locale_text: "Он полностью функционален. Однако его функционал фактически отличается от того, что ему приписывает {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}магос{/g} Эоганн. Демонстрация покажет что я имею ввиду".

languages.text: "He is fully functional. However, the servo-skull's actual functionality is different from {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Eogunn's characterisation of it. A demonstration will show what I mean."
languages.original_text: "Он полностью функционален. Однако его функционал фактически отличается от того, что ему приписывает {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}магос{/g} Эоганн. Демонстрация покажет что я имею ввиду".

traits.locale_text: "He is fully functional. However, the servo-skull's actual functionality is different from {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Eogunn's characterisation of it. A demonstration will show what I mean."
"He is fully functional. However, the servo-skull's actual functionality is different from Magos Eogunn's characterisation of it. A demonstration will show what I mean."
"He is fully functional. However, the servo-skull's actual functionality is different from Magos Eogunn's characterisation of it. A demonstration will show what I mean."

languages.text: «Funciona completamente. Sin embargo, el funcionamiento real del servocráneo es diferente al que le atribuye el {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}magos{/g} Eogunn. Una demostración dejará claro lo que quiero decir».
languages.original_text: "He is fully functional. However, the servo-skull's actual functionality is different from {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Eogunn's characterisation of it. A demonstration will show what I mean."

traits.locale_text: «Funciona completamente. Sin embargo, el funcionamiento real del servocráneo es diferente al que le atribuye el {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}magos{/g} Eogunn. Una demostración dejará claro lo que quiero decir».

languages.text: “其各项机能运转完好。然而，该伺服头骨的实际效能指标，与伊奥贡{g|Encyclopedia:Magos}贤者{/g}的描述存在逻辑偏差。执行演示程序即可证明我的观点。”
languages.original_text: "He is fully functional. However, the servo-skull's actual functionality is different from {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Eogunn's characterisation of it. A demonstration will show what I mean."

traits.locale_text: “其各项机能运转完好。然而，该伺服头骨的实际效能指标，与伊奥贡{g|Encyclopedia:Magos}贤者{/g}的描述存在逻辑偏差。执行演示程序即可证明我的观点。”

languages.text: « Non, il est en parfait état de marche. Cependant, son fonctionnement diffère de la description qu'en fait {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Eogunn{/g}. Il suffira d'une simple démonstration pour vous faire comprendre ce que je veux dire. »
languages.original_text: "He is fully functional. However, the servo-skull's actual functionality is different from {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Eogunn's characterisation of it. A demonstration will show what I mean."

traits.locale_text: « Non, il est en parfait état de marche. Cependant, son fonctionnement diffère de la description qu'en fait {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Eogunn{/g}. Il suffira d'une simple démonstration pour vous faire comprendre ce que je veux dire. »

languages.text: "Tamamen işlevsel. Ancak hizmeletin gerçek işlevselliği, {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Eogunn'un onu tasvir edişinden farklı. Ufak bir gösterim, ne demek istediğimi açıklayacaktır."
languages.original_text: "He is fully functional. However, the servo-skull's actual functionality is different from {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Eogunn's characterisation of it. A demonstration will show what I mean."

traits.locale_text: "Tamamen işlevsel. Ancak hizmeletin gerçek işlevselliği, {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Eogunn'un onu tasvir edişinden farklı. Ufak bir gösterim, ne demek istediğimi açıklayacaktır."

languages.text: "Er ist voll funktionsfähig. Allerdings unterscheidet sich die tatsächliche Funktionalität des Servoschädels von {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Eogunns Beschreibung. Eine Demonstration wird verdeutlichen, was ich meine."
languages.original_text: "He is fully functional. However, the servo-skull's actual functionality is different from {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Eogunn's characterisation of it. A demonstration will show what I mean."

traits.locale_text: "Er ist voll funktionsfähig. Allerdings unterscheidet sich die tatsächliche Funktionalität des Servoschädels von {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Eogunns Beschreibung. Eine Demonstration wird verdeutlichen, was ich meine."

languages.text: "彼は完全に機能している。しかし、サーボ・スカルの実際の機能は、マゴス・エオグンの性格付けとは異なっている。デモンストレーションを見れば、私が言いたいことがわかるだろう"
languages.original_text: "He is fully functional. However, the servo-skull's actual functionality is different from Magos Eogunn's characterisation of it. A demonstration will show what I mean."
